languages.text: "Никак нет, традиции полка священны. Если вам это не важно, то мне и моим людям — да".
"We cannot. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."
languages.original_text: "Никак нет, традиции полка священны. Если вам это не важно, то мне и моим людям — да".

traits.locale_text: "We can't. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."
"We can't. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."
"We cannot. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."
"We cannot. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."

languages.text: “我们不能。军团的传统是神圣的。也许对您来说无关紧要，可对我和我的人来说，这就是一切。”
languages.original_text: "We cannot. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."

traits.locale_text: “我们不能。军团的传统是神圣的。也许对您来说无关紧要，可对我和我的人来说，这就是一切。”

languages.text: "Yapamayız. Alayın gelenekleri kutsaldır. Sizin için hiçbir şey ifade etmeseler bile benim ve halkım için her şey demektirler."
languages.original_text: "We cannot. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."

traits.locale_text: "Yapamayız. Alayın gelenekleri kutsaldır. Sizin için hiçbir şey ifade etmeseler bile benim ve halkım için her şey demektirler."

languages.text: « Il ne peut en être autrement. Les traditions du régiment sont sacrées. Même si elles ne veulent rien dire pour vous, elles sont d'une importance capitale pour moi et les miens. »
languages.original_text: "We cannot. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."

traits.locale_text: « Il ne peut en être autrement. Les traditions du régiment sont sacrées. Même si elles ne veulent rien dire pour vous, elles sont d'une importance capitale pour moi et les miens. »

languages.text: «No podemos. Las tradiciones del regimiento son sagradas. Aunque no signifiquen nada para usted, lo son todo para mí y los míos».
languages.original_text: "We cannot. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."

traits.locale_text: «No podemos. Las tradiciones del regimiento son sagradas. Aunque no signifiquen nada para usted, lo son todo para mí y los míos».

languages.text: "Das können wir nicht. Die Traditionen des Regiments sind heilig. Auch wenn sie Euch nichts bedeuten, bedeuten sie mir und meinen Leuten alles."
languages.original_text: "We cannot. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."

traits.locale_text: "Das können wir nicht. Die Traditionen des Regiments sind heilig. Auch wenn sie Euch nichts bedeuten, bedeuten sie mir und meinen Leuten alles."

languages.text: 「我々はできない。連隊の伝統は神聖なものだ。君たちには意味がないかもしれないが、私と私の部下たちにはすべてを意味する。」
languages.original_text: "We cannot. The regiment's traditions are sacred. Even if they mean nothing to you, they mean everything to me and my people."

traits.locale_text: 「我々はできない。連隊の伝統は神聖なものだ。君たちには意味がないかもしれないが、私と私の部下たちにはすべてを意味する。」
